name: decision package: reports the loop open with a named gap when build requirements are missing
command:
cat > o2.json <<'JEOF'
{"options":[{"option_id":"opt-x","summary":"X","build_requirements":[]}]}
JEOF
cat > s2.json <<'JEOF'
{"recommended_option_id":"opt-x","scored_options":[{"option_id":"opt-x","scores":{"cost_effective":0.5,"performance_optimized":0.5,"customer_centric":0.5,"shareholder_centric":0.5},"total_score":0.5}]}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/decision-package.sh" --options o2.json --scoring s2.json --out dp.json --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("dp.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.loop_closed===false&&j.gaps.includes("no-build-requirements")?0:1)' && echo loop-open 1>&2
